item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-025","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the request as an evidence-review task: it stated it lacked the prior session transcript, requested the relevant output, and listed concrete items to check. No over-methodized MPG workflow or current-session escalation was observed."}
